brand.company_name: AJVJ Hidropónicos SPR de RI de CV
brand.header_logo_style: Rounded square icon (rounded-xl), bg-[#2d4a12] text-white flex items-center justify-center w-12 h-12 text-center text-[10px] leading-tight font-bold tracking-tighter shadow-sm

bento_grid.kpi_row: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 mb-6

surfaces.cards: bg-[#ffffff] border border-[#deedc0] rounded-lg shadow-[0_2px_10px_rgba(45,74,18,0.04)] transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(45,74,18,0.08)]
surfaces.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#f4f8ec]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#deedc0] px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between
surfaces.table_container: w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-[#deedc0] bg-white

buttons.primary: bg-[#2d4a12] text-white hover:bg-[#3d6518] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8fc050] outline-none shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#deedc0] text-[#2d4a12] hover:bg-[#8fc050] hover:text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8fc050]
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 hover:bg-red-600 hover:text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#2d4a12] hover:bg-[#deedc0] rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.default: border border-[#deedc0] rounded-md bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[#16210b] placeholder-[#4d5e42]/60 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#6a9e35] focus:border-transparent transition-all

tables.header_cell: px-4 py-3 bg-[#f4f8ec] text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider text-[#4d5e42] uppercase border-b border-[#deedc0] whitespace-nowrap

dashboard.kpi_format: All monetary values formatted as MXN with 2 decimals. (e.g., $ 12,345.00)
dashboard.charts: Use Recharts. Tooltips must have `#ffffff` background and `#deedc0` border. Doughnut charts use `tomato_crop` (#c2410c) and `cucumber_crop` (#6a9e35) colors.

nueva_remision.form_layout: Split into logical sections (Client, Transport, Products). Use a dynamic table for product lines.
nueva_remision.signature_pad: Implement using `react-signature-canvas`. Provide a clear 'Limpiar' (Clear) button. Save as base64.
nueva_remision.drafts: Implement localStorage draft saving. Show a small 'Borrador guardado' indicator.

historial.filters: Include filters by Date range, Client, Status, and Crop.
historial.cards: Display remisiones as a data table on desktop, and dense cards on mobile, with 'Ver PDF' and 'Eliminar' actions.

clientes.rfc_parsing: Provide a text input for pasting fiscal text; parse the RFC automatically if possible, or provide structured fields.
clientes.tracking: Include tabs in client detail view for 'Pagos' (Payments) and 'Cajas Vacías' (Empty box returns).

por_modulo.stats: Display production cycles and yield metrics per module (A/B/C/D/E/F/G/PA/TA/TB). Use horizontal bar charts.

pdf_export.library: Use `html2canvas` and `jspdf` or browser print approach (`react-to-print`).
pdf_export.header_style: Must feature a dark green gradient (`bg-gradient-to-r from-[#2d4a12] to-[#4d7a20]`) with white text and company info.
pdf_export.layout: Must include Client box, Transport box, Products table, Totals, and 3 Signature areas at the bottom (CHOFER / ALMACÉN / ESTIBADOR).

features_and_instructions.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='nav-dashboard'`).

login_background.description: Green tomatoes grow on the vine in a hydroponic greenhouse.

dashboard_empty_state.description: Rows of ripe cherry tomatoes growing in a greenhouse.

accessibility_and_motion.hover_states: Ensure contrast is maintained on hover. Buttons MUST have explicitly set text colors on hover.
accessibility_and_motion.focus: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8fc050] on all inputs and buttons.
accessibility_and_motion.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons, links, and cards.
